🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert JPG to PNG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your JPG files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Converting JPG to PNG gives you a lossless copy that won't degrade further when you edit and re-save it, and PNG is the right choice when you need a format that supports transparency. The conversion is done in your browser — your images are never uploaded.

How to convert

  1. Drag your JPG images into the box above.
  2. Each is re-encoded as a lossless PNG.
  3. Download the PNG files.

FAQ

Does converting to PNG add transparency?

No — a JPG has no transparency to begin with. PNG simply gives you a lossless container and the option to add transparency later in an editor.
